response.overview: ​Diamond Made Man Part 2 :​For the first time in global cinema, the protagonist, Doctor E. Sreehari, pilots the legendary Golden Mecha robot from within, engaging in a colossal, high-stakes battle against the antagonist atop a massive asteroid.  ​Boasting cutting-edge technology, mind-blowing visual effects, and a deeply poignant cosmic romance, 'Diamond Made Man Part 2'is set to hit the silver screen.  Diamond Made Man Part 2 - The Sequel Narrative.  Hero : Doctor E. Sreehari MBBS Actress : Vasudha villain : Hayagreeva  Productions : Sampreeth Productions  ( sampreethproductions@yahoo.com)
response.tagline: A love born in the stars, tested in the heart of a galaxy at war.
response.title: Diamond Made Man Part 2

release_dates.note: Will be release in multiple countries and multiple languags
